title: sync.json
description: Config for scripts/sync.ts — which local ($HOME) files to mirror into user/, grouped.

groups.description: Named groups; each lists entries to mirror from $HOME into user/.

oneOf.description: Path relative to $HOME, copied to user/<path> (e.g. ".config/cmux/cmux.json").

from.description: Source path relative to $HOME. Defaults to `to` when omitted. Ignored if `cmd` is set.

to.description: Destination path relative to user/ (the $HOME mirror).

cmd.description: Run this shell command and write its stdout to user/<to>, instead of copying a file.
